name: Aaj Robibar
overview: The sitcom revolves around the day to day life of an eccentric household consisting of a grandfather, his three socially in-adept sons, two granddaughters, a boarder, the male-servant and the maid. From the eldest brother who remains a bachelor and plays chess with himself, to the servant who tries to peek in through a key-hole and gets squirted with ink on a daily basis, this show is thoroughly entertaining.

trailers.title: আজ একটা বিরাট ফাটাফাটি হইবো, মতি মিয়া বিচারের ধার ধারে না।
